name: Uckele Jiaogulan Circulation Support Powder Horse Supplement, 1-lb bag
description: Help your horse stay healthy during stressful events with Uckele Jiaogulan Horse Supplement. This supplement was made to help support your horse’s overall health including his circulatory, endocrine, immune and respiratory systems. It features jiaogulan, a potent antioxidant that may offer a variety of benefits including improved circulation, healthy hooves and regulation of mood, insulin and glucose. It also helps fight oxidative stress and boost your horse’s immune system. Jiaogulan offers well-rounded nutrition when your horse is experiencing stress. Simply serve as a palatable top dressing to his regular feed—each one-pound bag offers up to 65 days of support.
